features.name: Data Grid Tests
features.description: Automated UI tests covering data grid behaviors including sorting, collections management, color coding, datetime extraction, normalization, and table schema validation.
features.evidence_summary: All six guides cover internal tests for data grid operations (sorting, schema, color coding, normalization, datetime, collections) sharing the /help/_internal/tests/ URL prefix and the same grid-layer concern.

features.name: Dialog and UI Controls Tests
features.description: Automated UI tests for dialogs, input fields, context menus, tags, and viewer property panels.
features.evidence_summary: Dialogs, input fields, menus, and tags guides share UI-interaction themes; TestViewerForProperties is the live viewer fixture used for property-panel testing.

features.name: Data Connectivity Tests
features.description: Automated UI tests for data connectors and export: file connector, web connector, Elastic Search, DB query builder, and data export.
features.evidence_summary: File connector, web connector, Elastic Search, query-join, and export guides collectively verify the platform's data ingestion and connectivity layer.

features.name: Data Transformation Tests
features.description: Automated UI tests for the transformation editor, substructure filter, and the custom filter extension point.
features.evidence_summary: Transformation editor guide, substructure filter guide, and the testCustomFilter fixture all exercise data-mutation and filtering pipelines.

features.name: Collaboration and User Management Tests
features.description: Automated UI tests for user registration, invitations, project browsing, recently-opened views, and platform help.
features.evidence_summary: Registration, inviting friends, project browser, project gallery, recently-open views, and help guides collectively cover user onboarding and collaboration workflows.

features.name: Test Infrastructure
features.description: Shared fixtures, placeholder scripts, and package-level metadata supporting the UITests test suite.
features.evidence_summary: The Dummy script, readme, credits, and changelog entry are package-level infrastructure items not tied to any specific test domain.
